summary: Iteration 9 frontend-only verification: validated VocalFitness homepage palette overhaul (white + blue medical aesthetic), infinite-scrolling logo marquee in Trusted section, and 5 new corporate videos at strategic positions. All 16 acceptance criteria pass. No console errors, no horizontal overflow on mobile (375px), all data-testids present, all 4 hero/final CTAs open their modals, both languages render correctly.

trusted_section.notes: Mobile screenshot confirms grayscale logos, light bg, additional clients pills, academic partners grid renders correctly.

testimonials_section.light_bg: bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-blue-50/30 to-white (verified in source)

palette_audit.verification_method: grep -nE '(indigo|violet|cyan)' on both files returned no matches

test_evidence.language_toggle: IT/EN switch works, headline still visible after toggle

critical_code_review_comments: HomePage.jsx is 1279 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Recommend extracting each major section (Hero, Trusted, Method, Audience, Integration, Programmes, CEFR, Testimonials, Proof, Dapper, FinalCTA) into its own component file under /components/home/ for maintainability. Bilingual COPY object (~400 lines) should also live in a separate /content/home.js module.

Hero video readyState=0 / paused=true after 3s wait — confirms the 12.8MB MP4 takes longer to start (as the agent-to-agent note warned). Consider adding a poster image to mask the blank state, plus preload='metadata' or preload='auto' tuned to bandwidth. Currently no poster attribute on any of the 4 <video> tags.

TestimonialsSection.jsx still includes a dark fallback loading state (bg-slate-950 + slate-400 text on line 98-103) that contradicts the new light theme. Update that fallback to match the new light palette so a brief loading flicker doesn't show a dark band.
TestimonialsSection.jsx line 22 falls back to import.meta.env which doesn't exist in CRA — harmless but dead code, drop it.
Videos lack accessibility: no aria-label / no <track> captions. For institutional/corporate audiences this matters. At minimum add aria-label describing each video.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 palette overhaul fully verified. The 4 new <video> elements (hero, method, integration, dapper) are present with correct src URLs and data-testids. The vf-marquee infinite scroll renders 15 logos (3x set). Steve Dapper section remains intentionally dark — do NOT flag as a palette regression. Future improvements suggested: split HomePage.jsx into per-section components, add video posters, fix TestimonialsSection dark loading fallback.
